publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:30:18 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM04287Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records4287Compiled by N. DeanDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
agric humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:48:31 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records
Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County
4287
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
1914-2010. Reports, programs, meeting minutes, photographs, newsclippings. General files related to county extension work, including publications, reports, photographs, and meeting minutes Collection material in English 2084385
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
N. Dean
Date completed:
February 1994
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, May 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, March 2018
Cite As:
Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records, #4287. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
General files related to county extension work, including publications, reports, photographs, and meeting minutes.
Photographs. Home economics extension work. Agricultural extension work.
